item.title: PhilHealth premium hike set for July 2026 - Manila Bulletin
item.description: PhilHealth contribution rate will increase from 5% to 5.5% starting July 2026

item.title: Mobile Legends MPL PH Season 14 grand finals break viewership records - Rappler
item.description: MPL PH Season 14 grand finals attract 2 million concurrent viewers

item.title: Typhoon Carina: PAGASA raises Signal No. 3 over Northern Luzon - Philippine Star
item.description: PAGASA warns of heavy rainfall as Typhoon Carina makes landfall

item.title: Jollibee Chickenjoy meme takes over TikTok Philippines - ABS-CBN
item.description: Viral Jollibee Chickenjoy comparison meme reaches 5 million views

item.title: SB19 announces PAGTATAG world tour additional dates - Inquirer
item.description: P-pop group SB19 adds 10 new cities to PAGTATAG world tour
